name: legacy-unknown-protocol-rejected
description: The executable form of the legacy-string freeze: the legacy protocol set is closed at exactly five values ('oauth2', 'mcp_oauth', 'aauth', 'x401', 'ap2_vi'). A mapping implementation handed any other protocol string (here the hypothetical 'atrib_delegation') MUST reject rather than silently inventing a profile URI. New evidence types register as envelope profiles; they never extend the mapping table.
